text.message: Chris, I think we need to go after boote for overtaking you
Hard to argue with that! But no Patrick to cut into your lead so the focus remains on your 11 point lead!
I am trying to make a truce with you after all this time
Gotta keep the eyes on the prize - make the year not a John run away win
We can't let Chris win another year
Unbelievable roll on the first one
you said we had no truce
Lots of 6s to start the game
Brian, I will trade you ore for wheat
boote is going after your spot
maybe 3 isn't so bad after all
and maybe I should have clicked balanced dice...
I'm losing so many cards to 7...
that also means you have been getting cards though
Not really, I get up to 8 then immediately go down to 4
Yeah never had more than 7 cards
Brian is really getting fed cards today
I said yes to the trad so you chose to get rid of 2 more brick instead?
Didn't want to give you a settlement
it feels like a crowded board in general
I’ll lose this game pretty big no matter what at this point
Chris is set up very well
Yes I’m closest to him so I need to extend the game to get more points and not fall far behind… which I am right now
the other settlement on the 3 is better
chris is two roads away from winning
that doesn't change what I said
This game, brought to you by 6s and 3s
Hilarious that you’d trade with him too
well, it is in my benefit if the game had just ended
but instead he just built roads...
I was giving much more for a brick than that…
